content.rendered:
About the Role

The Social Media Manager will manage 2–5 company accounts per month across Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, TikTok, Telegram, and X (Twitter). The role includes creating and publishing content, managing social media campaigns, engaging with audiences, monitoring performance, improving Google rankings through SEO, managing Google Business Profiles, increasing website traffic, generating leads, and supporting overall digital marketing and brand growth.

Key Responsibilities

Creating and publishing content, managing social media campaigns, engaging with audiences, monitoring performance, improving Google rankings through SEO, managing Google Business Profiles, increasing website traffic, generating leads, and supporting overall digital marketing and brand growth.

Requirements

Requirements & Qualifications

Candidates should have proven experience in social media management, digital marketing, and content creation. Strong knowledge of Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, TikTok, Telegram, and X (Twitter) is required. Applicants should have experience in SEO, Google Business Profile management, social media advertising, graphic design, video editing, content planning, and lead generation. Strong communication, creativity, multitasking, and time management skills are essential.

Required Skills

Social media, Social media/digital communication, Search Engine Optimization (SEO), Knowledge in digital communication and social media

What We Offer

No information provided.

How to Apply

Interested candidates should submit their CV to media@skylightethiopia.com. Please ensure that your application clearly states the position you are applying for. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
